plain_message: Marketing emails must include an unsubscribe mechanism (CAN-SPAM, GDPR Article 21). Add an unsubscribe link or header before sending bulk email.
Setting analytics or tracking cookies without a consent check violates GDPR and ePrivacy Directive. Gate this behind a consent check or use a strictly necessary cookie.
Automated data collection from third-party websites may violate terms of service and data protection law. Verify you have permission to collect and use this data.
Sending personally identifiable information to analytics platforms violates GDPR. Anonymise or pseudonymise this data before tracking.
Marketing lead tables should have a defined retention policy. GDPR requires you to delete contact data when the purpose for processing expires. Add a scheduled purge.
Embedding third-party tracking pixels (Meta, Google) without consent violates GDPR. Ensure pixels only fire after consent is granted.
